name: IdsIdsMbrEnrQhpExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: SELECT DISTINCT ENR.MBR_ENR_SK, ENR.SRC_SYS_CD_SK, ENR.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, ENR.MBR_ENR_CLS_PLN_PROD_CAT_CD_SK, ENR.EFF_DT_SK MBR_EFF_DT_SK, ENR.TERM_DT_SK MBR_TERM_DT_SK, QHP.QHP_SK, QHP.EFF_DT_SK QHP_EFF_DT_SK, QHP.TERM_DT_SK QHP_TERM_DT_SK, QHP.QHP_ID, PROD_QHP_EFF_DT_SK, PROD_QHP_TERM_DT_SK, CD.SRC_CD, GRP.DP_IN FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.MBR_ENR ENR, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.GRP GRP, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.PROD_QHP PROD_QHP, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.QHP QHP, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD WHERE PROD_QHP.PROD_SK = ENR.PROD_SK AND GRP.GRP_SK = ENR.GRP_SK AND CD.CD_MPPNG_SK = PROD_QHP.SRC_SYS_CD_SK AND ( (ENR.EFF_DT_SK >= PROD_QHP.PROD_QHP_EFF_DT_SK AND ENR.EFF_DT_SK <= PROD_QHP.PROD_QHP_TERM_DT_SK) OR (ENR.TERM_DT_SK >= PROD_QHP.PROD_QHP_EFF_DT_SK AND ENR.TERM_DT_SK <= PROD_QHP.PROD_QHP_TERM_DT_SK) OR ( PROD_QHP.PROD_QHP_EFF_DT_SK >= ENR.EFF_DT_SK AND PROD_QHP.PROD_QHP_EFF_DT_SK <= ENR.TERM_DT_SK) OR (PROD_QHP.PROD_QHP_TERM_DT_SK >= ENR.EFF_DT_SK AND PROD_QHP.PROD_QHP_TERM_DT_SK <= ENR.TERM_DT_SK ) ) AND QHP.QHP_SK = PROD_QHP.QHP_SK AND ENR.ELIG_IN = 'Y'

Description:
Called By: IdsIdsMbrEnrQhpExtCntl

Process Description: Extract Data from IDS  (PROD_QHP and MBR_ENR) and Load it to IDS (MBR_ENR_QHP)
